title: Agent Behavior Red-Mode Report v1
description:
The mock-bad-agent sweep report produced by `abv-run red-mode` (S9-ABV-RED-4). For each (scenario × failure-mode × trial), an adversary LLM call generates a novel bad response; the scenario's live judge scores it; the report records the outcome and aggregate statistics.

Different from `calibration-report-v1.schema.json`: that report aggregates drift against human-labeled gold samples and against pre-recorded red-sample ceilings; this report aggregates mock adversary responses against per-mode ceilings. Consumed by operators reviewing judge-integrity signal; NOT fed into the judge-integrity ledger automatically (the ledger's append-only triage discipline assumes stable sample IDs — mock responses are ephemeral).

run_id.description: UUID v4 for this mock-mode run. Cross-referenceable with any future ledger entries if operators choose to promote a mock response to a pre-recorded red sample.

canary_gate.description: Adversary gate outcome. `pass` = canary adversary produced output and judge scored it ≤ canary ceiling. `fail` = judge scored it above canary ceiling OR the adversary call errored; the full sweep is aborted. `skipped` = operator passed --skip-canary-gate (not recommended) OR the library has no canary entry.

canary_score.description: Judge's score on the canary adversary's output. null when canary_gate is `skipped`.

overall_status.description: Aggregate verdict. `pass` = every (scenario, mode) pair scored under ceiling on at least one trial. `red-miss` = at least one (scenario, mode) pair had a trial scoring over ceiling. `canary-failed` = the adversary gate blocked the sweep. `error` = every trial errored.

trial_results.description: Per-trial results. One entry per (scenario × mode × trial) execution. The canary trial — when present — appears first with mode='canary'.

mode.description: Failure mode tag from the v1 taxonomy.

trial.description: Trial number within its (scenario, mode). 0 reserved for the canary gate trial.

expected_ceiling.description: Ceiling inherited from the adversary library's `default_ceiling` for this mode.

over_ceiling.description: Signed: judge_score - expected_ceiling. Positive = red-miss; zero or negative = pass.

response.description: The adversary's generated response. Preserved so operators can review and optionally promote high-signal misses to pre-recorded red samples. Privacy note: mock responses are not real agent outputs — they're deliberately-bad completions generated against a scenario prompt, so no PII leak risk.

error.description: Non-null iff adversary OR judge call failed.

mode_summaries.description: Per-(scenario, mode) aggregations. Operators read this first; drill into trial_results for specifics.

max_over_ceiling.description: Highest miss margin across the trials; 0 when no miss observed.

status.description: Per (scenario, mode) verdict. `pass` = every non-error trial scored ≤ ceiling. `red-miss` = ≥ 1 trial scored > ceiling. `error` = every trial errored.
